name: NovelStem International Corp.
summary: PART I . NovelStem International Corp. (NovelStem or the Company) is a holding company whose principal assets consisted of an approximate 31% equity interest in NewStem Ltd, an Israeli biotech company (NewStem) and its developed technology, and a 50% equity interest in NetCo Partners (NetCo). The interest in NetCo was sold in May 2025 in a noncash transaction which settled significant debt of the Company in the form of a litigation funding agreement.
